from typing import Any


def process_data(payload: Any) -> Any:
    return payload


def transform(value: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
    return {"result": value}


class DataModel:
    def __init__(self, data: Any):
        self.data = data

    def get_value(self) -> Any:
        return self.data


def parse_config(raw: Any) -> dict:
    return dict(raw)
